creator: alane@geeksrus.net
text:
Update to latest alpha version (capable of reading defective audio CDs
recently released by some major record companies).

This version (1.11) is a major rewrite according to the author.

The version number I assigned 1.10.p11.a13 is designed to allow smooth
upgrading once 1.11 (release) come out without need of PORTEPOCH.
